title: DSP-8021 DSP-8022 Add sentinel and antiAffinity for redis
description:
## Description
- Adds anti-affinity to redis pods so that they can get scheduled on different nodes
- Adds priority classes so that during node refreshes the replicas can evict first, then the master
- Adds PDBs
- Adds terminationGracePeriod, lifecyclehooks and startUpProbes

title: Draft: [Part3] ClamAV version is updated to 1.4.3 Resolve DSP-7172
description:
Although the ticket specifies updating the ClamAV version to 1.0.9 (as per the ClamAV documentation in the console), I found that the most recent version is 1.4.3. This is part 3 of the MRs for the luna-bakery repository, and this MR cannot be merged at this time. It can only be merged once we start baking AL2023 AMIs in the production environments.

sh-5.2$ sudo clamscan --version
ClamAV 1.4.3/27787/Thu Oct  9 09:31:07 2025
sh-5.2$ sudo freshclam --version
ClamAV 1.4.3/27787/Thu Oct  9 09:31:07 2025

title: Draft: [6789] PART 2 - luna-bakery - AL2023 Migration
description:
This MR updates the luna-bakery customization scripts executed during the AMI baking process to support AL2023 AMIs. 

This MR should remain unmerged until we are prepared to start baking AL2023 AMIs for production environments and commence the production migration to AL2023.

title: Draft: [DSP-6573] PART 1 AMI Transition from AL2 to AL2023
description:
There will be numerous merge requests (MRs) for this epic, primarily affecting luna-bakery, ng-infrastructure, terraform-aws-eks module, eks-worker, and eks-cluster module for 1.0 infrastructure. Additional MRs may be required once we complete the IMDS transition from IMDSv1 to IMDSv2 calls. I can only merge all these MRs when every component is ready and the IMDS migration is complete. I've begun raising MRs early to gather reviews and address questions about the changes being implemented for this epic.

This Part 1 of the MR addresses naming convention issues encountered with AL2023 AMIs. The base image name used for AMI filtering has changed from 'eks-node-1.32' to 'eks-node-al2023-x86_64-standard-1.32' in AL2023, which significantly altered the AMI tags and names generated for baked AL2023 AMIs. This MR primarily contains changes to maintain naming conventions consistent with those used for AL2 AMIs. Additionally, since SELinux is set to permissive mode by default in AL2023, I've removed the SELinux script and its associated configuration from the template.

Draft: [DSP-6123] Automate airbyte ssh key generation
description:
## Description
Following https://gitlab.com/abacusinsights/abacus-v2/next-gen-platform/ng-infrastructure/-/merge_requests/1075, we now have the ability to generate SSH key secrets as part of deployment of the Airbyte component when needed. In the case of these three clients (Cambia, PHP, and Medstar) this secret has already been generated manually so we'll need to import those resources into Terraform before merging this MR (thus the `Draft` mode.
